prerequisites: A Klarna merchant account with access to the Klarna Merchant Portal.
Klarna API credentials (an API username and an API key) generated in the Merchant Portal under Settings.
The region your Klarna account operates in: Europe (EU), North America (NA), or Oceania (OC). This must match the value of the region config field.
Decide whether to connect to the Playground (test) or Production (live) environment. The credentials and base URL must match the chosen environment.

authMethods.name: HTTP Basic authentication (API credentials)
authMethods.summary: Klarna's APIs use HTTP Basic Authentication. Set the username config field to the API username (a UUID-format identifier shown in the Merchant Portal) and the password secret field to the matching API key. Klarna API keys carry the format klarna_<live|test>_..., so the key must correspond to the selected playground or production environment.

setupSteps.title: Generate Klarna API credentials in the Merchant Portal
setupSteps.body: Log in to the Klarna Merchant Portal and open Settings. Select the option to generate a new Klarna API credential / API key. Klarna displays an API username (in UUID form) together with the API key. Copy and store both immediately, as the API key is shown only once.

setupSteps.title: Set the username and password
setupSteps.body: Enter the API username into the username config field. Enter the API key into the password secret field. These two values form the HTTP Basic credentials Klarna uses to authenticate API requests.

setupSteps.title: Select the environment with the playground field
setupSteps.body: Set the playground config field to indicate whether to connect to Klarna's Playground (test) environment or the live Production environment. Ensure the credentials you generated belong to that same environment (test keys for Playground, live keys for Production).

setupSteps.title: Select the region
setupSteps.body: Set the region config field to the region matching your Klarna account: Europe (EU), North America (NA), or Oceania (OC). The region determines which Klarna API base URL is used, so it must match where your account and credentials were issued.
